results.title: ECB’s Rehn Says Energy Shock Is Producing Stagflationary Effects
results.description: The conflict in the Middle East is stoking inflation while weighing on economic expansion, according to European Central Bank Governing Council member Olli Rehn.

results.title: Oklahoma Gov. Stitt responds to SCOTUS birthright citizenship, transgender athletics rulings
results.description: News 9 spoke to Gov. Kevin Stitt to learn more about the impacts of Tuesday's Supreme Court rulings in Oklahoma.

results.title: Two Rallies in Hodeidah Declare Readiness to End Siege & Aggression
results.description: Two large rallies were held in the Al-Mina and Al-Hawak districts of Hodeidah Governorate, declaring a general mobilization and readiness to join the battle to reclaim rights and break the siege, in response to the call of the revolution's leader.
